/usr/bin/c++ -O2 -g -fno-omit-frame-pointer -pg -g -O2 -O2 -g -DNDEBUG  -pg CMakeFiles/consumer.dir/callFriendService.cpp.o CMakeFiles/consumer.dir/__/friend.pb.cc.o -o /home/kai/KVstorageBaseRaft-cpp/bin/consumer   -L/home/kai/KVstorageBaseRaft-cpp/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/home/kai/KVstorageBaseRaft-cpp/lib /home/kai/KVstorageBaseRaft-cpp/lib/librpc_lib.a -lprotobuf -lboost_serialization
